lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains 'EW79 10148245' which is an order/reference number, not an LC reference. No bankterm context such as 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', or 'Documentary Credit' is present.

locations_found: Invoice header/logo: 'ESS-ENN' and 'ESS-ENN Timber AB - Skruvbyvägen 2 A - S-365 94 Skruv'
Invoice footer: 'Ess-Enn Timber AB, Skruvbyvägen 2 A, 365 94 Skruv'
Invoice body: 'Ess -Enn Timber AB, Skruvbyvägen 2, 365 94 SKRUV'

criteria_met: Consignor 'ESS-ENN TIMBER AB' identified in invoice as issuer 'Ess-Enn Timber AB'
Consignee 'K.R. INDUSTRIES' identified in invoice as 'K.R.INDUSTRIES' in Invoice address field
Certificate remarks reference 'EW79 10148245' partially matches invoice number '10148245'
pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met: consignor matches invoice issuer, consignee matches invoice address, and the certificate reference contains the invoice number. Valid document pair.

checkpoints.certificate_value: ESS-ENN TIMBER AB, SKRUVBYVAGEN 2A, 365 94, SKRUV, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Ess-Enn Timber AB, Skruvbyvägen 2 A, 365 94 Skruv, Sweden (VAT: SE556381721101)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.detail: The consignor name 'ESS-ENN TIMBER AB' is found in the invoice header as 'ESS-ENN Timber AB', in the invoice footer as 'Ess-Enn Timber AB', and in the body text as 'Ess -Enn Timber AB'. After normalization of case, the names are identical: 'ess-enn timber ab'. Rule 4.1.0 is satisfied — no need to proceed to sequential testing 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

The invoice VAT number 'SE556381721101' has prefix 'SE' which verifies Sweden. The invoice header line also states 'ESS-ENN Timber AB - Skruvbyvägen 2 A - S-365 94 Skruv' where 'S-365 94' uses the Swedish country prefix. Country verified as Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Country verification via VAT prefix SE

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'ESS-ENN TIMBER AB' in Sweden. Invoice issuer: 'Ess-Enn Timber AB' at Skruvbyvägen 2 A, 365 94 Skruv with VAT SE556381721101. After case normalization: 'ess-enn timber ab' = 'ess-enn timber ab'. Exact match. Country verified via SE VAT prefix. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: K.R. INDUSTRIES, NO.29. KOSAPUR VILLAGE, Puzhal Panchayat Union, Ambattur Taluk, Madhavaram, Chennai, India
checkpoints.invoice_value: K.R.INDUSTRIES, NO 29, Kosapur Village, Puzhal Panchayat Union, Madhavaram, 600060 CHENNAI, Indien

comparison_steps.description: Identify consignee in primary invoicing field
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has 'Invoice address' field (primary invoicing field) containing 'K.R.INDUSTRIES'. This is the authoritative consignee per 4.2.0.2 priority 1.

Certificate: 'K.R. INDUSTRIES' → normalized: 'k.r. industries'. Invoice: 'K.R.INDUSTRIES' → normalized: 'k.r.industries'. The only difference is spacing around dots, which is a minor formatting difference (extra spaces normalization). Same juridical party.
Certificate states 'India'. Invoice states 'Indien' (Swedish for India). After normalization of country names: India = Indien. Country verified.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification – Invoice address field is primary invoicing field
Name normalization – case and spacing normalization

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'K.R. INDUSTRIES' in India. Invoice address: 'K.R.INDUSTRIES' in 'Indien'. Name normalization: 'k.r. industries' vs 'k.r.industries' — difference is only spacing around periods, which is allowed under extra spaces normalization. Country: 'India' vs 'Indien' — 'Indien' is the Swedish name for India. These are equivalent. Both IEC and GST identifiers match between documents (IEC: AATFK6824H, GST: 33AATFK6824H1Z0), further confirming same juridical party. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
10 containers, 157 packages
Pinus sylvestris
Pine sawn timber
checkpoints.invoice_value:
Pine sawn timber 19x89, 157 packages
10 containers, 157 packages

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.detail: No explicit article numbers are listed in the certificate. The certificate contains a goods description without product codes. Priority 1 not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and verify in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'Pine sawn timber'. The invoice product line reads 'Pine sawn timber 19x89, 157 packages'. The phrase 'Pine sawn timber' is found exactly in the invoice text. The addition '19x89' is a size specification — a non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4. The certificate also mentions 'Pinus sylvestris' which is the Latin botanical name for Scots Pine — this is supplementary taxonomic information. The core product identification 'Pine sawn timber' matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that additional text does not alter product identity
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice adds '19x89' (dimension specification) and the certificate adds 'Pinus sylvestris' (botanical name). Neither of these additions change the product model, variant, quality, or identity. The core designation 'Pine sawn timber' is identical in both. Per 4.3.4, these additions do not cause MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'Pine sawn timber' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions – '19x89' in invoice and 'Pinus sylvestris' in certificate are supplementary

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Pine sawn timber' (with 'Pinus sylvestris' as botanical name). Invoice goods: 'Pine sawn timber 19x89'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Pine sawn timber' appears exactly in both documents. '19x89' is a dimension specification (non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4). 'Pinus sylvestris' is the scientific name for pine (supplementary). Package details '10 containers, 157 packages' match in both documents. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The addition of '19x89' in the invoice could indicate a different product variant
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.3.4, size/dimension specifications that do not change the product's model, variant, quality, or identity are non-identity-bearing additions. '19x89' is a size specification (19mm x 89mm) for the same pine sawn timber.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains two quantities: 468.149 CBM and 214920.000 KGS gross
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains: (1) 468.149 CBM (volume), (2) 214920.000 KGS gross (weight). Per 4.4.3.1, at least ONE must be verified.

Certificate: 468.149 CBM. Invoice: 468,149 M3. After normalization: CBM and M3 are the same unit (cubic meters). The numeric value 468.149 (using period as decimal separator) matches 468,149 (using comma as decimal separator). These represent the same value: 468.149 cubic meters. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 214920.000 KGS gross can be found in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The invoice does not contain any explicit weight value (no KG, KGS, MT, or gross/net weight field). Per 4.4.3.1, since the volume quantity already matches, the absence of weight in the invoice does not cause MISMATCH. 'Systemet ska INTE kräva att samtliga kvantitetsuppgifter verifieras.'

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice contains a weight value that contradicts certificate weight
comparison_steps.detail: The invoice does not contain ANY weight value. Therefore no explicit contradiction exists. Per 4.4.3.1, the absence of weight information in the invoice does not constitute a contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check – volume 468.149 CBM found as 468,149 M3 in invoice
Multiple quantities – at least one verified (volume). Weight absent from invoice, no contradiction.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 contains two quantities: 468.149 CBM and 214920.000 KGS gross. Invoice product line states quantity 468,149 M3. Volume verification: 468.149 CBM = 468,149 M3 (same value, different decimal notation and unit abbreviation; CBM = cubic meters = M3). This is an exact match. Weight verification: Invoice contains no weight field at all — no GW, NW, or any KG/MT figure. Per 4.4.3.1, at least ONE quantity must be verified — volume is verified. The absence of weight in the invoice is not a contradiction (no competing weight value exists). Per 4.4.6.1 critical delimitation, since volume is already verified as MATCH, the absence of a second quantity type does not downgrade to MANUAL_REVIEW. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Weight 214920 KGS gross cannot be verified — should this be MISMATCH?
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.4.3.1 and its critical delimitation (4.4.6.1 vs 4.4.3.1), when multiple quantity values exist in the certificate and at least one (volume) is verified as MATCH, the absence of the other quantity type in the invoice does not downgrade the result. The invoice does not contain any weight that contradicts the certificate weight.

comparison_steps.description: Find explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of origin: Sweden' in the product description area, below the container listing.
Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exact match, no normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice
Positive verification – Sweden explicitly identified in invoice origin field

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Direct, exact match. No normalization required. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.

Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin). Document B is invoice. Invoice number 10148245 referenced in certificate remarks matches invoice. Single invoice from same issuer as consignor. Valid pair.
PASSED. All three criteria met: consignor=issuer, consignee=invoice address, reference number matches.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name search in all invoice pages
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. 'ESS-ENN TIMBER AB' found as 'Ess-Enn Timber AB' in invoice header, footer, and body.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix SE)
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. SE prefix in VAT number confirms Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority identification – Invoice address field
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. Primary invoicing field 'Invoice address' contains K.R.INDUSTRIES.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. 'Pine sawn timber' found exactly in invoice.
MATCH. '19x89' is a dimension specification, 'Pinus sylvestris' is botanical name — neither alters product identity.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Multiple quantities – at least one verified
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. Volume verified. Weight absent from invoice — no contradiction.
MATCH. Explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' found in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren ESS-ENN Timber AB, mottagaren K.R. Industries, varubeskrivningen Pine sawn timber, volymen 468,149 CBM och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor ESS-ENN TIMBER AB matches invoice issuer Ess-Enn Timber AB. Consignee K.R. INDUSTRIES matches invoice address K.R.INDUSTRIES in India. Goods description 'Pine sawn timber' found exactly in invoice. Volume 468.149 CBM matches 468,149 M3. Country of origin Sweden explicitly confirmed in invoice. Weight 214920 KGS gross could not be verified in invoice (no weight field present) but is not contradicted, and volume verification satisfies the minimum requirement.
non_blocking_observations: Certificate reference 'EW79' in remarks does not match invoice field 'Yours order no: EW78' — minor discrepancy in order reference (79 vs 78). This is not a verification checkpoint and does not affect the result, but is noted for awareness.
Weight 214920.000 KGS gross from certificate cannot be verified in invoice (no weight field present). Volume verification satisfies minimum requirement per 4.4.3.1.

sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'ESS-ENN TIMBER AB' identifieras i fakturans sidhuvud som 'ESS-ENN Timber AB' och i sidfoten som 'Ess-Enn Timber AB'. Efter normalisering av versaler/gemener är namnen identiska. Land Sverige verifieras via VAT-nummer SE556381721101 (SE-prefix). MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Consignee found in primary invoicing field (Invoice address). Name normalized for spacing. Country normalized India/Indien.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'K.R. INDUSTRIES' identifieras i fakturans faktureringsfält 'Invoice address' som 'K.R.INDUSTRIES'. Skillnaden är enbart mellanslag efter punkter — tillåten formatnormalisering. Land: 'India' i certifikatet vs 'Indien' (svenska) i fakturan — ekvivalenta landnamn. IEC- och GST-nummer matchar exakt mellan dokumenten (AATFK6824H och 33AATFK6824H1Z0). MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Identity-bearing main designation 'Pine sawn timber' found exactly in invoice. Additions are non-identity-bearing.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Pine sawn timber' förekommer exakt i fakturans produktrad. Fakturan tillägger '19x89' (dimensionsangivelse) och certifikatet tillägger 'Pinus sylvestris' (botaniskt namn) — dessa är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg som inte ändrar produktidentiteten. Paketinformation '10 containers, 157 packages' överensstämmer. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Volume 468.149 CBM verified as 468,149 M3 in invoice. Weight not verifiable (no weight in invoice) but not contradicted. At least one quantity verified.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets volym 468.149 CBM identifieras i fakturan som 468,149 M3 (CBM = M3, decimal punkt vs komma). Exakt överensstämmelse. Certifikatets vikt 214920.000 KGS gross kan inte verifieras i fakturan då fakturan saknar viktuppgift helt. Enligt regel 4.4.3.1 räcker det att verifiera minst en kvantitetsuppgift, och ingen motsägande viktuppgift finns i fakturan. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Origin 'Sweden' explicitly stated in dedicated origin field in invoice.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' (ruta 3) identifieras exakt i fakturans explicita ursprungsfält 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Direkt och exakt överensstämmelse. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result=IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation=AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All confidence values >= 0.85 for MATCH checkpoints. No contradictions detected in motivations vs statuses.
